evals.prompt: I have a React Native app that scans barcodes with react-native-vision-camera's built-in code scanner (useCodeScanner). I want to replace it with Scandit BarcodeCapture. Here is my screen: VisionCameraScanner.tsx
evals.expected_output: The skill removes the react-native-vision-camera code scanner (useCodeScanner, the Camera codeScanner prop, vision-camera imports), adds a Scandit BarcodeCapture integration with the matching symbologies (EAN13UPCA, Code128, QR), preserves the ScannedCode dedup logic and the scanned-count summary, and shows a setup checklist.

assertions.text: react-native-vision-camera is NOT imported in the output code (it may appear in a before/after summary)
useCodeScanner is NOT called in the output code (it may appear in a before/after summary)
The vision-camera Camera component's codeScanner prop is NOT present in the output code (it may appear in a before/after summary)
DataCaptureContext.initialize( is present (v8 API)
DataCaptureContext.sharedInstance is used to obtain the context
new BarcodeCapture(settings) is present
dataCaptureContext.addMode( is called to attach the BarcodeCapture mode
settings.enableSymbologies(...) is called
Symbology.EAN13UPCA is enabled (mapped from 'ean-13')
Symbology.Code128 is enabled (mapped from 'code-128')
Symbology.QR is enabled (mapped from 'qr')
Symbology.QRCode does NOT appear as a Symbology enum value (the correct case is Symbology.QR)
<DataCaptureView is rendered as JSX with a context prop
new BarcodeCaptureOverlay( is constructed and added via addOverlay
barcodeCapture.addListener( is called with a didScan callback
The didScan callback reads session.newlyRecognizedBarcode
camera.switchToDesiredState(FrameSourceState.On) is called to start the camera
The existing dedup behavior is preserved (a scanned value already in the list is not added again) (semantic)
The scanned-count summary (Scanned: <count>) is preserved in the rendered output
Setup checklist mentions scandit-react-native-datacapture-core and scandit-react-native-datacapture-barcode
Setup checklist mentions npx pod-install for iOS
Setup checklist mentions NSCameraUsageDescription in the iOS Info.plist
A summary of changes is shown listing what vision-camera code was removed and what Scandit code was added
